# nondischargeable.org

> Guide to nondischargeable debts in bankruptcy -- debts that survive Chapter 7 and Chapter 13.

nondischargeable.org is a free, open-source educational resource about debts that cannot be eliminated in bankruptcy. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://nondischargeable.org/: Guide to nondischargeable debts -- student loans, taxes, fraud, support obligations

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
